accepted_findings.message_regex: This path depends on a .*user-provided value
accepted_findings.reason: Paths are constrained by PathConfig and security helpers (resolveSafePath/sanitizers) with boundary checks; scanner cannot fully infer custom guards.
Routes use explicit rate-limit middleware and auth middleware; static analysis misses middleware chaining across router layers.
CSP is intentionally disabled only in development; production config enables CSP directives.
Destination hosts are fixed provider APIs; user input affects only identifiers/parameters, not protocol/host.
Helpers are best-effort text conversion utilities for preview/content mapping, not primary trust-boundary sanitizers.

accepted_findings.message_regex: regular expression does not match script end tags
accepted_findings.reason: Regexes are used for formatting cleanup in helper paths; not relied upon as complete XSS sanitizers.
These findings are in content transformation/preview helper code, not in direct untrusted script execution sinks.
Markdown rendering path has been hardened; residual scanner output here is accepted as conservative false positive.
Matched strings are LinkedIn platform identifiers/URN literals in code, not credentials or secrets.
